name: knowledge
description: Marketplace for the knowledge plugin: a personal knowledge base with an explain skill and a KB scaffolder.

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Write single self-contained interactive HTML explainers — Background, Intuition, Code, a cited best-practices-and-next-steps section, and a 5-question quiz — into your own personal knowledge base (a searchable MkDocs site backed by a FastAPI document API), and connect to the hosted KB or scaffold the whole KB from scratch with one setup skill.
